notes: Implemented analytic 2-link IK (hip yaw, hip pitch, knee pitch) matching Quadruped pattern.
Bipedal gait alternates left/right stance phases with sinusoidal foot lift.
GaitPhase: [0; 0.5] offset, GaitFrequency 1.5 Hz, StepHeight 0.08 m, StepLength 0.06 m.
Gait toggle via 'g' key bound through Controller.
